introSection: Megablitz is a steel roller coaster located at Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria. Built by Vekoma, it has a unique layout using the MK-700 track system. It opened in 1994 on the spot previously occupied by the Cortina Bob.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has numerous turns and three helices.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Orange track and white supports. The ride used to feature red track and blue supports.

fullText:
Megablitz is a steel roller coaster located at Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria. Built by Vekoma, it has a unique layout using the MK-700 track system. It opened in 1994 on the spot previously occupied by the Cortina Bob.

The ride has numerous turns and three helices.

Orange track and white supports. The ride used to feature red track and blue supports.
